Motion To Compel Pltf'S Medical Records
Off Calendar Jun-27-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE.
Marie Isom for defendants and moving party: The Regents of the University of California and Kevin Bozic.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion to compel production of plaintiff's medical records is granted. No opposition has been filed. The Court finds good cause to order production as the plaintiff has placed his mental and emotional condition at issue. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Marcie S. Isom for defendant and moving party: Kevin Bozic, The Regents of The University of California and The University of California San Francisco Medical Center
Frank Sarro for plaintiff and opposing party: Michael Hayes

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendants' Motion To Compel Medical Authorizations is denied. Defendant's remedy is to seek a court order for the release of Plaintiff's psychiatric records. All requests for sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT
